description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black and olive green color scheme. It has a fixed stock with a skeletal structure, providing both stability and reduced weight. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control during firing. The upper receiver sports a full-length Picatinny rail, suitable for mounting various optics or accessories, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights. The barrel is of standard length and is capped with a flash hider at the muzzle. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal and polymer materials.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a fixed skeletal stock, detachable box magazine, vertical foregrip, and a full-length Picatinny rail. It features a black and olive green finish with standard iron sights and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, flash hider, and the vertical foregrip beneath the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fixed skeletal stock, detachable box magazine, vertical foregrip, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's structure and the alignment of the upper receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the magazine, foregrip, and stock, with more detail on the ejection port area.
